name: claw
description: Personal AI agent gateway — Express server that fields Discord/Gmail and delegates work to vanilla Claude Code.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-reporter=spec src/__tests__/state.test.ts src/__tests__/discord-helpers.test.ts src/__tests__/gmail-helpers.test.ts src/__tests__/dashboard-helpers.test.ts src/__tests__/router.test.ts src/__tests__/messenger-adapter.test.ts src/__tests__/auto-analysis.test.ts src/__tests__/importance-prefilter.test.ts src/__tests__/skill-detector.test.ts src/__tests__/tmux-runner.test.ts
